distance_km.note: Multiple sources confirm the Engadin Frauenlauf is a 17 km race from Samedan to S-chanf

elevation_m.note: No web sources in search results provide elevation gain data for this race

country.note: Multiple sources confirm the race is held in Switzerland

region_state_province.note: Sources confirm the race is in Graubünden (Grisons), Switzerland. Engadin is a valley in Graubünden

discipline.note: Sources describe this as a cross-country skiing race (Langlauf). The term 'skate' refers to skate skiing, which is a different technique. Cross-country skiing races in the Engadin Marathon Week are classic style unless otherwise specified

typical_participants.note: Sources mention 'numerous participants from Switzerland and abroad' but do not provide specific participant numbers

year_founded.note: The 2026 edition is the 25th Engadin Frauenlauf. If 2026 is the 25th edition, the first edition was in 2002 (2026 - 25 + 1 = 2002), not 2001

official_website.note: The URL https://www.engadin-skimarathon.ch is cited as the official source for the Engadin Frauenlauf

typical_race_date.note: Multiple sources confirm the race is held in early March. The 2026 edition is scheduled for March 1, 2026
